description: Style Note Had an overdose of over the top blingy ethnic footwear? That's why portia dishes out this earthy pair. Pair them with jodhpuri pants or patialas - for a classic look opt for a fabindia kurta and linen leggings. Is experimental and edgy your thing? Then wear this with harem pants, a monochrome top and terracotta jewellery!Product Details Brown thong style straps with a knot detail at the apex of the strapsSoft brown footbedHas a mini-wedge at the heel regionTough outsole with grooves at the heel and forefoot regionMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
